summary: Verified tier pricing, sale pricing, and specifications features. Backend: 9/10 tests passed (1 skipped due to no tiles in /api/tiles endpoint). Frontend: Collections page loads correctly showing prices, color swatches, and tier_pricing_disabled behavior.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: 1) /api/tiles/collections returns tier_pricing_disabled flag and prices_from equals min_price for non-tier products. 2) Sale pricing endpoint (PUT /api/supplier-sync/products/sale-pricing) stores discount_percentage directly from user input. 3) /api/specifications/types/by-group returns groups with nested specifications arrays. 4) Publish endpoint includes all tier pricing and sale fields. 5) BulkCategoryEditorSections correctly parses nested spec structure. 6) SupplierProducts spec pre-population uses spec_${field} without underscore-to-dash conversion.

features_verified.tier_pricing_disabled_in_collections: ✓ API returns tier_pricing_disabled flag for each collection
features_verified.prices_from_equals_min_price: ✓ For tier_pricing_disabled=true collections, prices_from equals min_price
features_verified.specifications_nested_structure: ✓ /api/specifications/types/by-group returns groups with nested specifications arrays
features_verified.publish_includes_tier_fields: ✓ Code verified: tier_pricing_disabled, has_custom_tier_pricing, tier_discounts, sale_active, was_price, discount_percentage in tile_doc
features_verified.bulk_editor_spec_parsing: ✓ Code verified: BulkCategoryEditorSections correctly parses group.specifications arrays
features_verified.spec_prepopulation_no_dash_conversion: ✓ Code verified: SupplierProducts uses spec_${field} directly (e.g., spec_slip_rating not spec_slip-rating)

api_responses_verified.tiles_collections: Returns tier_pricing_disabled, prices_from, min_price, max_tier_discount, trade_discount, credit_back_rate
api_responses_verified.specifications_by_group: Returns array of groups with name and specifications array containing spec objects with name, slug, values
api_responses_verified.sale_collections: Bluestone and Tuscania collections show is_sale=true, tier_pricing_disabled=true, prices_from=min_price
